name: Sadia Rahman
text: The Padma Ilish was the cleanest I've ever cooked at home — already cut, no scales flying everywhere. Saved me 40 minutes of prep.

name: Tanvir Hossain
text: I'm a bachelor — the vacuum pouches are perfectly portioned. I just open one, defrost, cook. No waste. Subscribed for monthly.

name: Mehnaz Chowdhury
text: Chemical-free is real here. You can smell the difference. My in-laws ask where I source my Ayre from.

name: Rakib Khan
text: Delivery was on time, fish was cold. The Boal pieces were thick — restaurant style. Will reorder.
